basic_details.job_title: IIT Dharwad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad has released the official notification for 1 Research Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Karnataka. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate in any social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET /M.Phil. / Ph.D.
qualification.details: Post graduate in any social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET /M.Phil. / Ph.D.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Dharwad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
